learn.title: Health Education
learn.subtitle: Learn how to protect yourself and your community
learn.waterSafetyDesc: How to treat and store water
learn.boilWaterDesc: Always boil drinking water for at least 1 minute to kill harmful bacteria and parasites that cause waterborne diseases.
learn.emergencyDesc: If you experience severe symptoms, contact the health center immediately.
learn.rememberDesc: Prevention is better than cure. Share this information with your family and neighbors to keep everyone safe.

hygieneQuest.pageSub: Complete each module to protect yourself and your community
hygieneQuest.mod1Title: Wash your hands like a pro
hygieneQuest.mod1Text: Scrub for at least 20 seconds with soap and water — especially before eating, after using the restroom, after coughing, and after touching shared surfaces. Germs spread fast but soap breaks them down instantly.
hygieneQuest.mod2Title: Cover up when you cough or sneeze
hygieneQuest.mod2Text: Always use a tissue or the inside of your elbow — never your bare hands. Wear a mask in crowded indoor spaces during flu season. Disposing of tissues immediately stops respiratory germs from hitching a ride on surfaces.
hygieneQuest.mod3Title: Vaccines are your body's cheat codes
hygieneQuest.mod3Text: Staying up to date on vaccines for flu, typhoid, hepatitis, and COVID-19 trains your immune system before real pathogens arrive. Herd immunity protects those who can't be vaccinated — your shot matters for everyone around you.
hygieneQuest.mod4Text: Always wash fruits and vegetables under clean running water. Store raw meat separately and cook to safe internal temperatures. Refrigerate leftovers within 2 hours. Foodborne illnesses are preventable — the kitchen is your first line of defense.
hygieneQuest.tracker0: Complete a module to start your streak!
hygieneQuest.tracker1: Great start! Keep washing those hands 🧼
hygieneQuest.tracker2: Halfway there! You're a hygiene hero!
hygieneQuest.tracker3: 3 down! One more to finish the quest!
hygieneQuest.tracker4: Quest complete! You're a Health Champion! 🏆
